lastStrategyDecision.reason: Market evidence remains low-conviction for automated intraday entries: marketCondition is neutral, averageRelativeVolume ~1.0 provides no participation edge, averageGapPercent is slightly negative (-0.25%) reducing clean momentum continuation odds, averageLiquidityScore ~48.63 is only moderate (higher slippage/stop uncertainty), and averageCatalystScore ~20.55 is weak (lower follow-through probability). Although uptrendShare is relatively positive (0.65) and the scan is fresh (20/20 liveFresh), the overall quality does not justify initiating new orders. Maintain conservative long-only pullback-to-VWAP with bracket exits, but observe/rank only until RVOL, liquidity, and catalyst strength improve. Paper active exploration is enabled: live market data is fresh and the setup quality is acceptable, so the desk may take small paper trades while risk gates remain active.
